Title: Register Buyer
Steps: 1) Open /register 2) Fill name/email/password 3) Select role=buyer 4) Submit
ExpectedResult: Account created; redirected to /home; message shown; JWT stored

Title: Register Farmer With Profile + Payments
Steps: 1) Open /register 2) Fill name/email/password 3) Select role=farmer 4) Fill region/crops/bio/upi/bank 5) Submit
ExpectedResult: Account created; redirected to /home; profile saved; My Profile shows saved details

Title: Register Duplicate Email
ExpectedResult: Error shown: email already in use (or similar)

Title: Login Success
ExpectedResult: Redirected to /home; message shown; JWT stored

Title: Login Wrong Password
ExpectedResult: Error shown; no redirect; JWT not stored

Title: Top Profile Icon Visible On Protected Pages
ExpectedResult: Topbar visible; profile icon visible on each page

Title: Logout Clears Session
ExpectedResult: Session cleared; redirected to /login; protected routes blocked

Title: Farmer Profile Load/Save
Steps: 1) Open profile icon 2) My Profile 3) Fill region/crops/upi/bank 4) Save 5) Refresh page
ExpectedResult: Saved message shown; refresh loads same values

Title: Buyer Cannot Access Farmer Profile
ExpectedResult: Error message shown: only farmers can create profile

Title: Forgot Password Basic
ExpectedResult: Success message returned; reset token (if shown) present

Title: Reset Password Valid Token
ExpectedResult: Password updated; user logged in; redirected to /home
